items.ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
items.title: National Biodiversity Authority launches short term Internship Programme for College Students
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change National Biodiversity Authority launches short term Internship Programme for College Students Posted On: 25 MAR 2026 10:53AM by PIB Delhi The National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) launched short-term Internship Programme (upto 3 months), for students who are undergoing graduation/post graduation, to offer hands-on, project-based…
